item.title: Uber's User Surge, Waymo's Remote Guidance, Ford's Potential Partnership And Tesla's Call For Regulation: Weekend Round-Up
item.description: The tech and auto sectors saw major moves as Uber hit 200 million monthly users, Waymo faced scrutiny over remote guidance and a federal safety probe,...

item.title: The Insider Report: Cracks Deepen in the Rally's Foundation
Raising Cane's Continues Super Bowl Tradition, Closing Early So Workers Can Watch the Game
item.description: Raising Cane's will close its restaurants early to allow employees to watch Super Bowl LX. Importance Rank: 1 read more

item.title: Automakers Retreat From 2026 Super Bowl Advertising as Market Uncertainty Grows
item.description: Automakers are largely sitting out of Super Bowl 60 advertising, reflecting broader uncertainty in the US automotive industry. Importance Rank: 1 read...

item.title: Want To Go to the Super Bowl? Here's How Much It Will Cost You
item.description: The cheapest seat available is priced at $4,169, which is significantly higher than the average price of lower-tier tickets in previous years. Importa...
